allow: PowerShell($dest = ".claude\\skills"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dest | Out-Null; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $src = \(Resolve-Path "website-standards.skill"\).Path; $out = \(Resolve-Path $dest\).Path; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\($src, $out\); Get-ChildItem -Recurse $dest\\website-standards | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell($m = Get-Command magick -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($m\) { "magick: $\($m.Source\)" } else { "no-magick" }; $c = Get-Command convert -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "convert: $\($c.Source\)" } else { "no-convert" })
